## Registry contributions

Only applies when touching `registry/`.

- [ ] Consent tier declared and justified (self-published/stated/observed/social)
- [ ] Persons are stated-tier or better
- [ ] Every claim carries a source URL
- [ ] Fetch dates are real
- [ ] `node scripts/validate.mjs` passes
- [ ] OPTOUT.md checked
- [ ] No prose reproduced beyond quotation scale
- [ ] Entry added to `registry/index.json`
